title: push_subscription_set should be push_subscription_create
description: push_subscription_set is create-only (doc says so explicitly) but was not renamed in the _set→_create sweep. All other create-only operations were renamed (custom_emoji_create, space_ban_create, space_invite_create). A caller seeing push_subscription_set will assume update/destroy are also available. When those are added, the method name either collides with the existing signature or requires a breaking rename. Rename now before callers depend on it.
